title: Évora, Alentejo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Évora, Alentejo: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Évora is a city in Alentejo with a population of 57,073. A UNESCO World Heritage city in the Alentejo region, with a well-preserved Roman temple, medieval cathedral, and whitewashed streets.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
